title: Endgame Mastery Challenges
items: Unlock 'Mastery Challenges' section after all 6 main chapters completed
Mastery Challenge 1: 'XOR from NANDs' — build XOR using only NAND gates (4 NAND optimal)
Mastery Challenge 2: 'Full Adder from NORs' — build carry+sum using only NOR gates
Mastery Challenge 3: '3-to-8 Decoder' — massive 3-input, 8-output decoder challenge
Mastery Challenge 4: 'Reverse Engineer v2' — 3-input mystery gate, player deduces truth table by experimentation
Mastery Challenge 5: 'The Minimalist' — implement 4-input parity using ≤6 gates
'Mastery' tab on level select, styled gold/purple with distinctive visual treatment
Mastery completion awards unique cosmetic: 'Logician' wire color (cyan-gold gradient)
Separate mastery progress tracking (doesn't affect campaign stats)
'Master Logician' achievement — complete all 5 mastery challenges
